title: dryopteris chingii
intro: Dryopteris chingii, also known as Ching's golden fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to China and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, providing health benefits such as improved digestion and reduced inflammation. In herbal preparations, Dryopteris chingii is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
